name: Triversal
short_description: Unwind with Triversal: An award-winning casual spatial puzzle game that mixes chill with challenge.
detailed_description:
Triversal is a satisfying puzzle game that offers the perfect balance of chill and challenge.
Use spatial logic to suspend a sun over a black hole by connecting it to stretchy tethers.

This V2 Steam Edition has been rebalanced and expanded with new modes, puzzle packs and ways to play.

A Snack for your Brain: A perfect palette cleanser between intense tasks, whether you have a couple minutes or a couple hours to unwind.



Pick Up and Play: Triversal is easy to learn and satisfying to master; simply add and remove elastic tethers to pull the light sun so it lines up with the black hole. Play with mouse, keyboard or a controller. It’s as easy as 1-2-3.

A Perfect Balance of Chill and Challenge: Triversal offers a gentle learning curve and a range of puzzles and modes to suit your mood.

  • Daily Puzzle: Rack up perfect streaks, collect coins and compete for a high score on a new challenge daily.
  • Endurance: Complete level after level of progressively more difficult procedurally generated puzzles where each move costs a coin. Try to beat your high score before you run out of coins altogether in Standard, Pro or Classic Endurance.
  • Sandbox: Dial in your level of challenge to improve your strategy & skills or play through endless puzzles with no risk, no scores and no stress.
  • Puzzle Packs: Hundreds of levels in dozens of packs to work through at your own pace.

Streamer Assist: Collaborate with your streaming audience with the Streamer Assist feature, an optional overlay that adds numbered labels to your puzzles, allowing viewers to play along in chat by suggesting solutions.
